root_cause: compare_step in benchmark_shadow_runner.py does not account for CONTESTS relation. When shadow produces CONTESTS (two claims from different sources, same adj_key), comparator treats the older claim as supressed and reports false-negative invalidation and unexpected-active-set regressions.
freeze_boundary: 不得修改当前 run 输出、gold、R01、scope mapping 或历史报告来消除该问题
